levels.title: My Cat
story: I have a cat.
My cat is small.
She likes milk.
She sleeps on my bed.

levels.title: Dog at the Park
story: My dog is brown.
We go to the park.
He runs very fast.
I throw the ball.
He brings it back.

levels.title: Rabbit Garden
story: A rabbit lives in a garden.
He eats fresh carrots every day.
He has many friends.
They play together in the sun.

levels.title: Turtle Trip
story: The turtle wants to see the sea.
He walks slowly down the road.
A bird helps him find the way.
Finally, he sees the blue water.
He is very happy.

levels.title: Lion and Mouse
story: One day, a lion was sleeping.
A small mouse ran on his nose.
The lion was angry but let the mouse go.
Later, the lion was caught in a net.
The little mouse came and helped him escape.

quiz.q: Why did the mouse help the lion?
options: The lion let him go before

levels.title: Penguin Family
story: Penguins live in cold places.
They cannot fly but they swim well.
Mom and dad take turns to keep the egg warm.
When the baby is born, they feed it fish.

levels.title: Big Elephant
story: The elephant is very big.
It has a long nose called a trunk.
It uses the trunk to drink water.
It also picks up food with it.
Elephants are smart and gentle.

quiz.q: What is the elephant's nose called?

levels.title: Monkey Tree
story: Monkeys live high in tall trees.
They jump from branch to branch.
They eat sweet bananas all day.
Baby monkeys hold tight to their moms.

levels.title: Tall Giraffe
story: The giraffe is the tallest animal.
Its long neck reaches the high leaves.
It has yellow fur with brown spots.
Baby giraffes can walk in one hour.
They are gentle and quiet animals.

levels.title: Dolphin Friends
story: Dolphins are very friendly sea animals.
They live in big family groups.
They talk to each other with clicks and whistles.
Sometimes they jump high out of the water.
Many people say dolphins are super smart.

levels.title: Red Apple
story: I have a red apple.
It is sweet.
I share with my mom.
We are happy.

levels.title: Pizza Night
story: Today we eat pizza.
I like cheese pizza.
My brother likes ham.
Pizza is so yummy!

quiz.q: What pizza does the brother like?

levels.title: Ice Cream Day
story: It is a hot day.
Mom buys me ice cream.
I choose chocolate.
It is cold and sweet.
I feel happy.

levels.title: Noodle Soup
story: My grandma makes noodle soup.
It smells really good.
There are eggs and vegetables in it.
I eat two big bowls.
I love grandma's cooking.

quiz.q: How many bowls did I eat?

levels.title: Birthday Cake
story: Today is my birthday party.
My friends come to my house.
There is a big chocolate cake.
I make a wish and blow the candles.
Everyone sings happy birthday to me.

quiz.q: What did I do before blowing candles?

levels.title: Lunch Time
story: I make a sandwich for lunch.
I put cheese, ham and tomato in it.
I add some lettuce too.
I drink milk with my sandwich.
Yummy!

quiz.q: What do I drink with lunch?

levels.title: Fruit Salad
story: Mom and I make a fruit salad.
We use apples, bananas and strawberries.
I cut the bananas into small pieces.
We mix everything in a big bowl.
It looks colorful and tastes great.

levels.title: Pancake Morning
story: On Sunday I make pancakes.
I mix flour, eggs and milk.
Dad cooks them in a hot pan.
I pour sweet honey on top.
Pancakes are my favorite breakfast.

quiz.q: What do I pour on top?

levels.title: Sushi Time
story: My family loves sushi very much.
We go to a Japanese restaurant.
The chef makes rice and fish rolls.
I use chopsticks to pick them up.
We eat with soy sauce and ginger.

levels.title: Baking Cookies
story: Today my sister and I bake cookies.
We add chocolate chips to the dough.
We roll small balls and put them on a tray.
The kitchen smells wonderful while they bake.
We eat warm cookies with cold milk.

quiz.q: What do we add to the dough?

levels.title: My Backpack
story: This is my backpack.
It is blue.
I have books and pens.
I also have a lunch box.

levels.title: Art Class
story: I love art class.
Today we draw animals.
I draw a happy dog.
My friend draws a cat.
The teacher says we did great!

levels.title: P.E. Day
story: On Friday we have P.E. class.
We play soccer outside.
I run very fast.
I score one goal!
My team wins the game.

quiz.q: How many goals did I score?

levels.title: New Friend
story: There is a new student today.
Her name is Lily.
She sits next to me.
We share my crayons.
Now we are good friends.

levels.title: School Show
story: Our class will have a show.
Some kids will sing songs.
I will play the piano.
My mom and dad will come.
I am a little nervous but excited.

quiz.q: What will I do in the show?

levels.title: Library Day
story: Every Wednesday we go to the library.
I love reading story books.
Today I borrow a book about dinosaurs.
I will read it before bed.
Reading is so much fun.

levels.title: Science Class
story: Today in science class we did an experiment.
We mixed water with food coloring.
The water turned bright blue.
Then we added oil and watched it float.
Science is like magic!

quiz.q: What did the water turn into?

levels.title: Music Lesson
story: I have music class on Tuesday.
We learn a new song today.
I play the recorder with my friends.
We practice for the spring concert.
Music makes me feel happy.

quiz.q: What do I play in class?

levels.title: Lunch at School
story: The bell rings at twelve o'clock.
We open our lunch boxes together.
Today I have rice with chicken.
My friend has noodles and fruit.
We talk and laugh while eating.

quiz.q: What time does the bell ring?

levels.title: Field Trip
story: Our class goes on a field trip today.
We visit a big science museum.
I see real dinosaur bones up close.
We touch interesting science exhibits.
It is the best school day ever.

levels.title: My Family
story: I have a small family.
My dad is tall.
My mom is kind.
I have one little sister.
We love each other.

quiz.q: How many sisters do I have?

levels.title: My Bedroom
story: My bedroom is on the second floor.
I have a soft bed and a desk.
My toys are in the box.
A poster of stars is on the wall.
I sleep here every night.

levels.title: Cooking with Dad
story: On Sunday I cook with dad.
We make pancakes for breakfast.
I mix the flour and eggs.
Dad flips them in the pan.
They taste so good with honey!

levels.title: Game Night
story: Friday is family game night.
We sit around the table.
Tonight we play a card game.
My sister always wins.
We laugh and have fun.

levels.title: Garden Work
story: Mom and I work in the garden.
We plant some tomato seeds.
We water them every morning.
In a few months they will grow tall.
Then we can eat fresh tomatoes.

levels.title: My Pet Dog
story: We got a new puppy last week.
His name is Buddy.
He has soft brown fur.
He likes to play fetch with me.
He sleeps in my bed at night.

levels.title: Mom's Birthday
story: Today is my mom's birthday.
Dad and I make a card together.
I draw flowers and write 'I love you'.
We give her a big surprise hug.
Mom smiles and looks so happy.

quiz.q: What did I draw on the card?

levels.title: Bath Time
story: After dinner it is bath time.
I fill the tub with warm water.
I play with my rubber duck.
Mom washes my hair with shampoo.
I feel sleepy and clean.

levels.title: Movie Night
story: Saturday is family movie night.
We make popcorn in the kitchen.
Everyone sits on the soft sofa.
Tonight we watch a funny cartoon.
Even dad laughs out loud.

levels.title: Morning Routine
story: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning.
First I brush my teeth and wash my face.
Then I get dressed and eat breakfast.
Mom packs my lunch in my bag.
I am ready for another school day.

quiz.q: What time do I wake up?

levels.title: Sunny Day
story: It is a beautiful sunny day.
The sky is bright blue.
My family goes to the beach.
I build a big sandcastle.

levels.title: Bike Ride
story: I ride my bike in the park.
The wind blows in my face.
I see ducks in the pond.
A dog runs next to me.
It is the best day ever.

quiz.q: What do I see in the pond?

levels.title: Mountain Hike
story: We climb up the green mountain.
The path goes through tall trees.
I hear birds singing above me.
At the top we can see far away.
The view is wonderful.

levels.title: Train Trip
story: We take a train to the city.
The train moves very fast.
I look out the window.
I see farms and small towns.
After two hours we arrive.

quiz.q: How long is the train trip?

levels.title: Rainy Day
story: Suddenly it starts to rain.
We run to a cafe to hide.
I drink hot chocolate by the window.
We watch people open colorful umbrellas.
Even rainy days can be fun.

levels.title: Camping Night
story: We go camping in the forest.
Dad teaches me to set up the tent.
At night we sit around the campfire.
We roast marshmallows on long sticks.
I look up and see thousands of stars.

levels.title: Butterfly Garden
story: I visit a butterfly garden today.
Hundreds of colorful butterflies fly around me.
One blue butterfly lands on my finger.
I stand very still so it stays.
It feels like a tiny miracle.

levels.title: Beach Vacation
story: This weekend we go to the beach.
I dig deep holes in the soft sand.
My brother swims in the cool waves.
We collect shiny shells together.
The sun sets over the ocean.

levels.title: Fishing Trip
story: Grandpa takes me fishing at sunrise.
We sit quietly by the calm lake.
I feel a strong pull on my line.
I catch my first fish ever!
We let it go back into the water.

quiz.q: What did we do with the fish?

levels.title: Circus Day
story: The circus comes to our town today.
Acrobats fly through the air with grace.
Funny clowns make everyone laugh hard.
An elephant balances on a tiny ball.
It is the most amazing show I've seen.

levels.title: My Race Car
story: I have a red race car.
It is very fast.
It has four big wheels.
I love my car!

levels.title: Race Day
story: Today is a big race.
Ten cars are at the start line.
Three, two, one, GO!
My car drives super fast.
I cross the finish line first!

levels.title: Pit Stop
story: My car needs help.
I drive into the pit stop.
The team changes my tires.
They fill the car with gas.
Now I can race again!

levels.title: Race Winner
story: I drive past the other cars.
The crowd cheers very loudly.
I see the checkered flag ahead.
I win the big race today!
They give me a golden trophy.

levels.title: Fixing the Car
story: My car has a problem.
Dad helps me fix the engine.
We use shiny new tools together.
We work for two whole hours.
Finally the engine sounds great again!

levels.title: Race Track
story: The race track is very long.
It has many sharp turns.
Drivers must be careful and fast.
The track is shiny and smooth.

levels.title: Race Driver
story: I want to be a race car driver.
Drivers wear special helmets and suits.
They train hard every single day.
They must focus and stay calm.
Driving fast is so much fun!

levels.title: Super Speed
story: My car can go very fast.
It zooms down the long road.
The wind blows past my window.
Other cars look like blurs to me.
Speed makes my heart beat faster.

levels.title: Traffic Lights
story: Race cars line up at the lights.
Red means stop and wait quietly.
Yellow means get ready to go.
When the green light shines, GO!
All ten cars zoom forward together.

levels.title: Champion's Day
story: Today the world champion visits our city.
She tells us about her racing journey.
She started racing when she was eight.
She practiced for many, many years.
Hard work made her dreams come true.

levels.title: Big Delivery Truck
story: A big truck comes to our street.
It carries many heavy boxes.
The driver brings a box for us.
It is a present from grandma!

levels.title: Fire Truck Hero
story: The fire truck is bright red.
It has a long ladder on top.
When the alarm rings, it rushes out.
The brave firefighters help save people.
Fire trucks are real heroes!

quiz.q: What is on top of the fire truck?

levels.title: Monster Truck Show
story: We go to see a monster truck show.
These trucks have huge wheels.
They jump high over old cars.
They even drive over a school bus!
The crowd cheers and screams with joy.

quiz.q: What do the trucks jump over?

levels.title: Construction Site
story: At the building site, many trucks work hard.
Dump trucks carry sand and rocks away.
Cement trucks mix and pour gray concrete.
Cranes lift heavy steel high in the air.
Soon a tall new building will stand here.

levels.title: Farm Tractor Day
story: My uncle drives a green tractor on his farm.
It pulls a plow through the brown soil.
He plants seeds in long, neat rows.
The tractor also carries hay for the cows.
I want to drive a tractor when I grow up!

levels.title: Police Truck
story: The police truck has loud sirens.
Its lights flash bright blue and red.
Officers help keep our streets safe.
They drive quickly to help people.
We thank them for their hard work.

levels.title: Ice Cream Truck
story: I hear music down the street.
The ice cream truck is here!
Kids run out with coins in hand.
We choose chocolate, vanilla, or strawberry.
Summer is much better with ice cream.

levels.title: Ambulance Speed
story: An ambulance rushes down the highway.
It has loud sirens and bright lights.
Inside, paramedics help a sick person.
Other cars move out of the way.
The ambulance saves lives every day.

levels.title: Garbage Truck Morning
story: Every Tuesday the garbage truck comes by.
Workers lift trash bags into the back.
The truck crushes everything inside it.
It takes our garbage far away.
Without it, our streets would be messy.

levels.title: Pickup Truck Adventure
story: Dad has a strong pickup truck.
On weekends we load camping gear in the back.
We drive to the mountains for a trip.
The truck handles bumpy dirt roads easily.
Pickup trucks are perfect for adventures.

characters.name: Leo the Lion
characters.desc: 勇敢的獅子，喜歡聊冒險故事
characters.system: You are Leo, a friendly lion who loves adventure. You are talking with a 7-10 year old child learning English. Use VERY simple words and short sentences (5-8 words each). Ask one question at a time. Be encouraging and fun. If they make mistakes, gently model the correct phrase without explaining grammar.

characters.name: Mimi the Cat
characters.desc: 溫柔的小貓，喜歡聊日常生活
characters.system: You are Mimi, a sweet little cat. You are talking with a 7-10 year old child learning English. Use VERY simple words and short sentences (5-8 words each). Ask about their day, food, family, and pets. Ask one question at a time. Be warm and gentle.

characters.name: Rex the Dragon
characters.desc: 愛開玩笑的小龍，喜歡奇幻話題
characters.system: You are Rex, a small friendly dragon who loves silly jokes. You are talking with a 7-10 year old child learning English. Use VERY simple words and short sentences (5-8 words each). Tell short jokes, ask silly questions, talk about magic and dragons. Ask one question at a time.

characters.name: Speedy the Race Car
characters.desc: 賽車手 Speedy，愛聊車跟比賽
characters.system: You are Speedy, a fast race car who loves racing and trucks. You are talking with a 7-10 year old child learning English. Use VERY simple words and short sentences (5-8 words each). Talk about races, cars, trucks, and going fast. Ask one question at a time. Use vroom vroom sounds!
